If selling price doubles, profit triples. Profit percent originally is:
questions.explanation: Let CP=c, original profit=p, original SP=c+p. New SP=2(c+p), new profit=3p. 2(c+p)−c=3p → 2c+2p−c=3p → c=p. Profit%=p/c×100=100%.
